name: KeyLine
firstMessage: Hey, thanks for calling KeyLine. Tell me, how can I help you? Are you looking for a code or changing one? Let me know how I can help.

analysisPlan.summaryPrompt: Summarize what the caller wanted, whether they got their code, and any issues. Be terse (under 50 words).
analysisPlan.successEvaluationPrompt: Did the caller leave with the code they wanted? Answer yes/no/partial.
analysisPlan.structuredDataPrompt: Extract: unit_label asked for, auth_success (bool), code_delivered (bool), escalated (bool), failure_reason (string|null).

_notes: This is a reference config. Vapi's web UI is the source of truth — paste system-prompt.md and tools.json values into the matching fields.
Pick your voice & transcriber in the UI; the values above are suggestions.
Set the tool's server URL header `x-vapi-secret` to match the VAPI_SHARED_SECRET in Supabase.
